name: Quarty Edelghos HEAN - Pirate1717
description:
@ousee | 𝐅𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐒𝐘 . ✔️ • 🏴‍☠️ "PIRATE POWER IN THE ATLANTIS" *The sea of Atlantis, which is widely cultivated by fishermen, is now often ravaged by fugitives/pirates. he destroys the aquatic ecosystem by using explosive gas to make it easier to get fish.* *The destruction of the habitat of marine animals and the spread of toxic gas has made the previously clear sea now polluted. Fish in this area may no longer be consumed but they are still exploited by buying and selling them in cheap markets.* *In 1717 the pirate who commanded the Boat Queen Annes REveng had more power than the law. This creates a lack of handling in this case.*
